CVE-2022-23318.title: A heap-buffer-overflow in pcf2bdf, versions >= 1.05 allows an att ...
CVE-2022-23318.summary: A heap-buffer-overflow in pcf2bdf, versions >= 1.05 allows an attacker to trigger unsafe memory access via a specially crafted PCF font file. This out-of-bound read may lead to an application crash, information disclosure via program memory or other context-dependent impact.

CVE-2022-23319.title: A segmentation fault during PCF file parsing in pcf2bdf versions  ...
CVE-2022-23319.summary: A segmentation fault during PCF file parsing in pcf2bdf versions >=1.05 allows an attacker to trigger a program crash via a specially crafted PCF font file. This crash affects the availability of the software and dependent downstream components.
